title: Technical Poem Generation and Content Creation
body:
**Goal**
Add a poem to the project — theme, form, and tone are entirely your choice.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Poem is original and written for this project specifically
- [ ] Minimum 3 stanzas
- [ ] Submitted as `POEM.md` in the project root
- [ ] PR description includes a one-line note on the creative decision you made (why this theme, form, or tone)

/bounty $430
